title: WOS Drift Monitor Config
description: A WOS Drift Monitor Config sidecar document. Provides drift detection and monitoring configuration for agents in a WOS workflow -- drift detection methods, evaluation windows, alert thresholds, rubber-stamp detection, and deployment sequence policies. Monitoring parameters can be tuned independently of the governance document.

^x-.$comment: Vendor extensions per Kernel spec §10.6 (extensions escape hatch)

$wosDriftMonitor.description: WOS Drift Monitor Config specification version. MUST be '1.0'.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for WOS Drift Monitor Config sidecar

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor validation.

targetWorkflow.description: URI of the WOS Kernel Document this monitor applies to.

x-lm.intent: Binds this sidecar to the monitored workflow

version.description: Version of this Drift Monitor Config document.

title.description: Human-readable name for this drift monitor configuration.

x-lm.intent: Defines what to monitor for each agent and when to alert

deploymentSequence.description: Shadow/canary/production deployment sequence policy. RECOMMENDED for rights-impacting and safety-impacting workflows.

extensions.description: Extension data. All keys MUST be prefixed with 'x-'.

evaluationWindow.description: ISO 8601 duration of the evaluation window.

metrics.description: Metrics to track for this agent.

rubberStamp.description: Rubber-stamp detection for human reviewers of this agent's output.

alertThresholds.description: Conditions that generate alerts or trigger automatic governance actions.

method.description: Statistical method for drift detection. 'psi': Population Stability Index. 'ks': Kolmogorov-Smirnov test. 'chi2': Chi-squared test. 'accuracy': accuracy against human-reviewed ground truth. 'custom': implementation-defined method.

threshold.description: Threshold value for drift detection. Semantics depend on the method.

minReviewTime.description: ISO 8601 duration below which a review is flagged as potentially rubber-stamped.

maxAgreementRate.description: Agreement rate above which reviewer engagement is flagged.

evaluationWindow.description: ISO 8601 duration of the evaluation window for rubber-stamp metrics.

condition.description: FEL expression or metric condition that triggers the alert.

action.description: Automatic governance action to take when threshold is crossed. 'notify': alert administrators. 'demoteToAssistive': cap autonomy at assistive. 'demoteToManual': cap autonomy at manual. 'suspend': suspend agent invocations.

notifyRoles.description: Roles to notify when this threshold is crossed.

enabled.description: Whether the shadow/canary/production deployment sequence is enforced.

shadowDuration.description: ISO 8601 duration of the shadow phase.

canaryPercentage.description: Fraction of invocations routed to the canary version.

canaryDuration.description: ISO 8601 duration of the canary phase.

canaryReviewSamplingRate.description: Elevated review sampling rate during the canary phase.
